text:
Created attachment 247268
Patch to source tree to add OpenJDK22

Add a new port for the next release which should be available in April 2024. Am new to creating ports, so it will likely need a few iterations.  At the moment, unclear what best version number to use is. Initial build testing on x86_64 FreeBSD 15.0 Current.
